name: claude-state-drift
description: Marketplace for the claude-state-drift plugin — state-tracking for long Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: claude-state-drift
plugins.description: A per-project state layer for long Claude Code sessions: keeps a .claude/state.json (objective / current focus / deliverables), prints a WHERE YOU ARE orientation block at session start, re-injects the goal as you work, and nudges when state goes stale — with /where-am-i, /update-state, and /re-anchor.
